celestial_cluster.title: Collect 16 Celestial Dust (Celestisynth — sustained End farming run needed)

end_crystal_gem.title: Collect End Crystal fragments or Celestisynth-specific End gems for the Netherite fusion

subtitle.text: The End gives abundantly if you know where to look. You know where to look now.

description: 16 Celestial Dust is the material investment for a full Celestisynth gear set.
The End City expeditions from Ch14 gave you the navigation skills.
This is a sustained gathering run — not a boss fight.
- Specific End structures that generate outer islands
- Possibly crafted from End materials + specific processes
- Check the Celestisynth mod's JEI recipes for exact processing
The Elytra from Ch13 makes this efficient.
The Shulker Boxes from Ch13-14 hold the haul.
This is the long road home as logistics:
you know how to navigate the End now.
The End is a supply chain.
